content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.97%, VIX +8.43% to 18.26, broad-based sector weakness with only IT and Pharma green. Defensive rotation visible (FMCG names like MARICO, TATACONSUM, DABUR all up on Q4 beats). Existing book is well-positioned defensively; focus is risk management on winners (COFORGE +9.5%, MARICO +3%, LAURUSLABS +3.6%) and selective adds on quality breakouts.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23830,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+9.5% unrealized. Current SL 1352.99 is 1.8% below CMP 1378.90 — within trail-gap discipline (>1% below LTP). Holding stored SL 1352.99 already locks in ~7.5% gain; tightening marginally to 1340 to give breakout room above VWAP 1377 while pushing target to 1450 (next resistance band). R:R from CMP: 71/39 = 1.8. Blockbuster Q4 (PAT +134%, EPS beat +38%) thesis intact. NOTE: 1340 is slightly LOOSER than stored 1352.99 — if guardrail rejects (SL can only tighten), HOLD applies; setting at 1360 instead to ensure tightening direction."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL from 1352.99 to 1360 (locks ~8% gain, 1.4% below CMP 1378.90 — within trail-gap discipline). Raise target to 1450 given Q4 blockbuster + analyst TPs 1690-2020. R:R from CMP 90/19 = 4.7."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3% unrealized at 52-week high 843. Tighten SL from 828 to 832 (1.3% below CMP 842.70 — within trail-gap discipline). Bullish Q4 thesis (PAT +18%, vol +9%) intact, MOFSL TP 15% upside. Lock in +1.5% min on a name printing fresh highs."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+3.6% unrealized. Stored SL 1255 is 1.4% below CMP 1270.60 — already trailed tight. Kotak Sell TP 800 is a red flag but momentum is strong (52-week high). Stored SL already locks ~2.4% gain; not tightening further to avoid forced exit on normal noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1% unrealized, CMP 2788 vs SL 2760. Q4 PAT +11%, refrigerant capex catalyst. MS Underweight is overhang but technicals improving (+8% breakout day). SL 0.9% below CMP — already tight enough; not tightening further would trip on noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.4% but at 52-week high zone with volume surge 3.3x and Q4 beat (PAT +32%). SL 8950 is 1.3% below CMP 9066 — tight. Thesis intact; UltraTech/Adani competitive entry overhang but FY26 print justifies holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.4% unrealized. Stored SL 10440 is 1.6% below CMP 10615 — tight. Buyback Rs 12000 + dividend Rs 150 record date May 29 provides price floor. Thesis intact, hold to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.7% unrealized. SL 1198 is 3.4% below CMP 1239.50 — within risk budget. Q4 PAT +21% beat, 16% UVG, Starbucks turnaround. Stock pulled back from 1253 high but thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.5% unrealized. SL 468 is 2.3% below CMP 479.70. Q4 beat (PAT +15%), guidance upgrade to low-double-digit FY27. FMCG defensive on a risk-off day, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry but printing new 52-week high 8144 today. SL 7850 is 3% below CMP 8090. Q4 results May 27 is a binary catalyst — outside the 3-session window so OK to hold. Healthcare defensive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Flat at entry, 52-week high 886.80 hit today. SL 850 is 1.6% below CMP 863.90 — tight. Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61%, BULLISH research +0.10. Thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.1% on gold pullback as US-Iran de-escalation softens safe-haven. SL 121 is 2.2% below CMP 123.66 — within budget. Structural ETF flow story intact (11 consecutive months of inflows). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.0,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SKIP — MCX was on watchlist but full data not in this batch; cannot evaluate. Documented for rule-18 transparency."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 121 sufficient; gold pullback within structural uptrend."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 832, "reasoning": "Lock min gain at 52-week high on Q4 beat."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1360, "reasoning": "Lock ~8% on +9.5% winner; tighten with 1.4% gap to CMP."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Tight SL already; capex catalyst pending."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Tight SL, breakout intact."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Buyback floor May 29 supports."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "FMCG defensive, guidance upgrade."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already trailed tight; let momentum run."},
    {"symbol": "TATACONSUM", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 beat thesis intact, pullback within budget."},
    {"symbol": "CGPOWER", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Tight SL; 52w high breakout."},
    {"symbol": "APOLLOHOSP", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Fresh 52w high; Q4 result May 27 outside 3-session window."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Rule-18 admit walk-through: (a) DRREDDY/CIPLA — BLOCKED by Rule 11 binary-event (Q4 May 12 = next session); skip. (b) MRPL BULLISH +0.10 — sharp +8% one-day move with overbought tape and PSU-oil crude-sensitive overhang; pass on chase, watch for pullback to 155-158 zone. (c) TATACONSUM/DABUR/CGPOWER/COFORGE/POLYCAB/MARICO/LAURUSLABS/APOLLOHOSP/BAJAJ-AUTO — all BULLISH but ALREADY HELD; cluster cap & no-stack rule applies. (d) NIFTYBEES — index choppy at support, no edge for ETF add when book already defensive. (e) HCLTECH/INFY/PERSISTENT not provided in this batch. Deployment 45% with ~₹551K cash; book is 11 names already (high diversification, low conviction adds). Decision: management-side today is correct given VIX +8.4%, FII flows zero, and no qualifying NEW BULLISH ticker that isn't already held or event-blocked. Re-scan post Cipla/DRReddy results May 13.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is broad (11 holdings) and defensively tilted (FMCG, Pharma, Healthcare, Gold). COFORGE +9.5% is the standout winner — SL trailed. MARICO at 52-week high — SL trailed. HFCL pending BUY from prior session at 133.50 still OPEN — leaving in book; will re-evaluate next tick. Cumulative experiment P&L +0.48% on day 22; win rate 13% over 5d is poor but profit factor 0.9x reflects size discipline. Priority remains capital preservation on a high-VIX risk-off day; no new admits today is justified by event calendar (DRREDDY/CIPLA tomorrow) and cluster-saturation of the watchlist with names already held."
}
